name: T4.2-real-capture-phase-2b-1440p-known-hang
description: THE critical test. Same writers as T4.1 but HLS at 1440p @ 10Mbps — the exact configuration that wedged the Mac on 2026-04-11 13:32, now with real capture. If this FAILS (watchdog fires / machine hangs), failure mode 4 is reproducible in the harness and Tier 5 parameter sweeps can pin down the critical variable. If this PASSES, the hang is intermittent / state-dependent and we need different evidence (repeated runs, thermal state capture, display-config polling). DANGER — may hang the Mac. Save any open work first. Run alone via run-tier-4.sh.
